actions.SUPPLIER_SUBMISSION_REQUESTED: {{user}} wuxuu codsaday inuu gudbiyo {{quantity}} unug oo kaydka guud
actions.SUPPLIER_SUBMISSION_APPROVED: {{user}} wuxuu ansixiyay gudbinta alaab-qeybiyaha ee {{quantity}} unug
actions.SUPPLIER_PRODUCT_SUBMITTED_TO_INVENTORY: {{user}} wuxuu kaydka guud ku daray {{quantity}} unug
actions.SYSTEM_RESET: {{user}} wuxuu fuliyay dib-u-dejin nidaam oo dhammaystiran
actions.CUSTOMER_LOYALTY_ADJUSTED: {{user}} wuxuu wax ka beddelay dhibcaha daacadnimada {{pointsChange}}
actions.LOAN_REPAYMENT_RECORDED: {{user}} wuxuu diiwaan geliyay bixin deyn oo ${{amount}}
actions.LOAN_REPAID_FROM_WALLET: {{user}} wuxuu boorsada ku bixiyay ${{amount}} oo deyn
actions.STOCK_REQUEST_CREATED: {{user}} wuxuu alaab-qeybiyaha ka codsaday {{quantity}} unug oo kayd
actions.STOCK_RECEIVED: {{user}} wuxuu kaydka guud ku daray {{goodQuantity}} unug
actions.USER_PASSWORD_RESET: {{user}} wuxuu dib u dejiyay furaha sirta ah ee isticmaale
